name: Area efect
description: A Bandit launcher variant that fires three rockets for the cost of a single round. Its Maliwan barrel improves projectile speed and accuracy, but the rockets often slip past normal-sized enemies, so it works best when you place the splash on the ground or nearby surfaces instead of relying on direct hits.
notes: It is most effective when aimed at surfaces just beneath or beside enemies, especially human-sized targets and Loaders.
